ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complt
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Richard C. Stromberg, Esq. of the Law Offices of Richard C. Stromberg, Tel. 415.453.5400, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was argued. After argument, for good cause shown, the Court vacated the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF COASTSIDE LUMBER AND SUPPLY, INC. DBA SOUTH CITY LUMBER AND SUPPLY'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is granted. The motion is unopposed. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
